enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Don't include null items or empty lists.

enum_values.name: GraftNullItems
enum_values.summary: Null items are included in the grafted tree.

enum_values.name: GraftEmptyLists
enum_values.summary: Empty lists are included in the grafted tree.

enum_values.name: GraftAll
enum_values.summary: Null items and empty lists are both included in the grafted tree.
